overall.description: First-person perspective footage of walking along a dirt trail through grassland at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The video appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring steady movement past wooden fence posts and dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: nighttime nature trail through tall grass prairie

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path using a flashlight to illuminate the dark terrain ahead

entered.detail: vertical wooden posts marking the left boundary of the trail, visible in the flashlight beam
unpaved trail surface with visible tire tracks and gravel
dense shrubbery lining the right side of the path in the initial frames
tall vegetation flanking both sides of the trail, swaying slightly
dark silhouettes of trees on the horizon against the night sky
large rock formation visible on the right side as the path progresses

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through dense grassland at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing wooden fence posts on the left and tall grass on both sides. The environment is quiet and empty, with only the dark silhouettes of distant trees visible on the horizon beyond the reach of the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt trail through a dark, nocturnal grassland. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the gloom, illuminating a narrow path flanked by tall, dense grass. As the camera advances, the light reveals a series of weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the trail. The scene then extends toward the horizon, where the reach of the beam fades into the dark silhouettes of distant trees under a silent, empty sky.
